description_long: This is a large, cylindrical black metal barrel with three prominent silver metal reinforcement bands encircling its body. The top surface is partially covered with a vivid green liquid that appears to be oozing down the side, suggesting a hazardous or toxic substance. One side of the barrel displays a yellow warning label with a radiation symbol and the text 'RADIOACTIVE STOFFE', indicating the contents are dangerous. The surface of the barrel is worn and scratched, giving it a weathered, industrial appearance. The barrel is closed with a fitted lid, and there are no visible handles. Its overall design and markings suggest it is used for storing or transporting hazardous materials, likely in an industrial or urban environment.
description: A weathered black metal barrel with silver bands, green toxic liquid on top, and a radioactive warning label.
description_view_0: Front view showing green liquid spill and partial radioactive warning label.
description_view_1: Side view with green liquid visible on the top edge, no label visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible markings or liquid spill, showing only the barrel's worn surface.
description_view_3: Side view with full radioactive warning label and green liquid spill visible on the top edge.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: radioactive warning label with symbol and text
